title: Mexican Cod Tacos
description: A flavorful and spicy taco recipe featuring cod, served with a side of stew.
instructions: 2. Rinse the cod under cold water, pat dry with paper towels.
3. In a small bowl, mix together lime juice, cumin, chili powder, and garlic.
4. Brush the mixture on both sides of the cod fillets.
5. Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Add the cod fillets to the skillet, sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
7. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
8. Meanwhile, warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
9. Assemble the tacos by placing a cod fillet on each tortilla, topping with stew, and serving immediately.
